chrome-devtools.description: Browser automation and debugging. Good for interactive browser testing and Chrome DevTools Protocol access.

playwright.description: Automated testing and web scraping. Supports Chrome, Firefox, WebKit.

postgres-probability.description: Direct PostgreSQL database access for Probability app. Allows queries, table inspection, schema analysis.

_instructions.how_to_use: Copy the mcpServers section into your ~/.claude.json file (your global Claude Code config)
important_notes: The postgres-probability MCP requires the mcp-postgres.js script at /Users/danielcamacho/.claude/mcp-postgres.js
DATABASE_URL contains credentials - NEVER commit this file or share publicly
After adding MCPs to ~/.claude.json, restart Claude Code completely (not just the session)
Run 'nvm use' in the project directory to load Node.js 20.19.0 (required by chrome-devtools)
Each developer gets their own ~/.claude.json - these are NOT shared via the repository
_instructions.new_mcps: See .claude/MCP_SETUP_GUIDE.md for instructions on adding new MCPs
